speech-to-text.description: xAI REST STT with word timestamps, formatting, and diarization
speech-to-text.pricingTier: xAI public Voice API REST pricing
speech-to-text.pricingNotes: xAI lists Speech to Text at $0.10/hr for REST and $0.20/hr for Streaming. AutoShow uses the REST endpoint. Free credits, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: xAI REST STT accepts multipart audio uploads up to 500 MB. AutoShow sends format=true, language=en, and diarize=true, with file last. Streaming STT is separately priced and not used by extract.
